response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, search matches, and saved preferences as distinct findings.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call calendar_get, calendar_search, and calendar_profile together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the scheduling review, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve cal-221; search Denver for "Quarterly Capacity Review"; and load the saved operational preferences. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Report only the requested findings; do not infer or take a follow-up action.
